summary: Comprehensive testing of Session/Auth persistence, 404 catch-all route, Reservation Calendar, Rate Manager, and Exely sync fixes. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Login works correctly (POST /api/auth/login returns 200 with access_token and user)
VERIFIED: /auth/me endpoint works - validates token and returns fresh user data with role
VERIFIED: Session persistence - localStorage stores token/user/tenant/modules, page reload restores auth
VERIFIED: 404 catch-all route at App.js line 1987 redirects to /app/dashboard (authenticated) or /auth (unauthenticated)
VERIFIED: Reservation Calendar loads with room types (SUITE, DELUXE) and rooms visible
VERIFIED: ReservationCalendar.js getUnassignedBookingsForType (line 829) filters by visible date range
VERIFIED: ReservationCalendar.js line 2119 handles bookings starting before visible range (startIdx=0 fix)
VERIFIED: Rate Manager 3-panel layout working - update fields, room types, channels all visible
VERIFIED: Rate Manager has independent room type selection via selections state object (RateManager.jsx line 56)
VERIFIED: toggleRoomType function (line 125) handles per-room-type selection correctly
VERIFIED: Exely pull worker has name/date change detection at line 166-178 in exely_pull_worker.py
VERIFIED: Exely _check_individual_changes has 30-day cutoff optimization at line 233
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified: 1) Session persistence with localStorage.removeItem (not clear), 2) 404 catch-all redirects to dashboard, 3) ReservationCalendar date filtering for unassigned bookings works, 4) Rate Manager independent room type selection works, 5) Exely pull worker has name/date change detection and 30-day cutoff optimization. The Exely pull worker runs every 60s.

login_flow.details: POST /api/auth/login returns 200 with access_token, user, tenant

auth_me_endpoint.details: GET /api/auth/me returns fresh user data with role

session_persistence.details: Page reload preserves auth - token validated via /auth/me

reservation_calendar.details: Page loads with room types and rooms visible, 12 bookings loaded

rate_manager.details: 3-panel layout, 3 room types, 50 checkboxes, 2 tabs visible

pms_bookings_api.details: GET /api/pms/bookings returns list of bookings with required fields

pms_rooms_api.details: GET /api/pms/rooms returns rooms with room_number and room_type

playwright_tests_passed: Login flow - email/password fill, button click, dashboard redirect
Session persistence - page reload preserves auth state
Reservation Calendar - page loads, room types visible (SUITE, DELUXE)
Rate Manager - 3-panel layout, tabs, room types, update fields, channels visible
